scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev:worker" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && rsync -avz --delete frontend/dist/ root@pinote.contrivent.com:/var/www/pinote.contrivent.com/ && rsync -avz --delete --exclude node_modules backend/ root@pinote.contrivent.com:/opt/pinote/backend/ && ssh root@pinote.contrivent.com 'cd /opt/pinote/backend && npm install --omit=dev && pm2 restart ecosystem.config.json'
